steps: In a sterile microfuge tube add: A B 1 RNA solution 1ng-1 µg total RNA or 1-100 ng polyA-selected RNA Primer (50 µM dT or 60 µM Random Primer Mix) 2 µl 2 10 mM dNTP mix 1 µl 3 Nuclease-free H2O to final volume of 12 µl

Add the following (bringing to 20 µl final volume ): A B 1 5X ProtoScript II RT Reaction buffer 4 µl 2 0.1 M DTT 2 µl 3 Murine RNase inhibitor (40 U/µl) 1 µl 4 ProtoScript II Reverse Transcriptase (200 U/µl) 1 µl 5 Final volume 20 µl
Store products at -20 °C or proceed to next step(s).
Optional: Heat for 3-5 minutes at 65 °C - 70 °C . Spin briefly and place promptly On ice .
If Random Primer Mix is used, an incubation step at 25 °C for 00:05:00 is recommended before the 42 °C incubation in the next step.
creator: New England   Biolabs
